meaning: adj.单平面的 单面延展的 同平面的
examples: A uniplanar capacitive sensor, with 8-electrode on one plane substrate, is designed to detect the subsurface anomalies or damage of non-metallic materials.
To diminish the influence of the eddy currents, the design method of self-shielded gradient coils is studied and the self-shielded uniplanar gradient coils are designed in this paper.
